prompt: Create a square abstract kaleidoscopic geometric artwork in a strict two-color palette of vivid crimson red and soft bubblegum pink. The composition is perfectly symmetrical on both vertical and horizontal axes, with an additional diagonal mirror feeling, filling the entire canvas edge to edge. Use sharp flat vector-like triangular polygons only, no gradients, no outlines, no shadows, and no texture. Build the image from nested triangles and recursive fractal triangle clusters: 1 central diamond-shaped medallion made of many tiny red and pink triangles, 4 pointed triangular spires extending from the medallion toward the top, bottom, left, and right, 4 large mirrored corner rosette structures containing dense miniature triangle mosaics, 4 long diagonal fractal bands running from the center area toward the corners, and 8 large pink star-like polygon arms radiating around the center. The overall impression should resemble an origami mandala, a crystalline tessellation, or a Sierpinski-triangle kaleidoscope, with alternating red and pink triangular facets forming a bold symmetrical abstract pattern. Keep the design crisp, high contrast, flat, mathematically precise, and decorative, with no text, no border, no objects, and no recognizable figures.
